positive: A detailed, symmetrical central composition featuring an ornate stylized celestial creature emerging from blooming jungle flora. The creature should have clean, defined silhouettes resembling a mythological winged fox or phoenix, surrounded by highly detailed tropical foliage (large leaves, exotic flowers like hibiscus, and curling vines). The style should be highly contrasted, vibrant neo-traditional tattoo art meets elegant botanical illustration. Use deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted against warm, glowing gold accents and crisp white negative space. The lighting should be dramatic and back-lit, emphasizing the clean edges of the silhouette. Highly suitable for apparel printing, central focus, symmetrical balance, high contrast, clean vector aesthetic.
negative: low quality, blurred, dirty, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, abstract, cartoon, grayscale, messy, messy background
